description: Apply style rules to code sample, detect violations, collect results, and report findings
entry_points: detectText(content, filePath) — regex-based scan for non-HTML or jsdom fallback
activity_flow: START: Receive input (CLI args / stdin / file path / URL)
YES → detectUrl(url) → Puppeteer DOM scan → collect findings
NO → BRANCH: is input a directory?
YES → walkDir(dir): recurse, filter SCANNABLE_EXTENSIONS, skip SKIP_DIRS
→ detectFrameworkConfig(dir): check for Next/Vite/etc config files
→ BRANCH: framework dev server detected? → warn user on stderr
→ buildImportGraph(files): resolve import paths, build importer map
→ BRANCH: >50 files and TTY? → confirm() prompt to continue
→ For each file: BRANCH HTML? → detectHtml() ELSE detectText()
NO (single file) → BRANCH HTML? → detectHtml() ELSE detectText()
OUTPUT: formatFindings(allFindings, jsonMode) → stdout (text or JSON)
detectHtml_flow: READ file → inline linked local stylesheets (replace <link> with <style>)
buildBorderOverrideMap(document, window): pre-pass to recover CSS var() border values jsdom drops
checkElementColors(el, style, tag, window) → push findings
checkElementIconTile(el, tag, window) → push findings (heading+sibling icon tile)
detectText_flow: SPLIT content into lines; detect file extension
runRegexMatchers(lines, filePath, offset=0, blockContext) → regex-based findings
extractStyleBlocks(content, ext) → pull <style> blocks from Vue/Svelte SFCs
FOR EACH block: runRegexMatchers(blockLines, filePath, block.startLine-1, true)
extractCSSinJS(content, ext) → pull CSS template literals from JS/TS
FOR EACH block: runRegexMatchers(blockLines, filePath, block.startLine-1, true)
DEDUPLICATE: remove findings with same antipattern+snippet within 2 lines
YES → run REGEX_ANALYZERS[] (page-level checks) → push findings
key_check_functions: checkElementBorders(tag, style, overrides?): parse border widths/colors from computed style; apply 'overrides' map as fallback for jsdom var() dropouts; delegate to checkBorders()

checkBorders(tag, widths, colors, radius): skip BORDER_SAFE_TAGS; for each side detect 'side-tab' (thick colored side border ± radius) or 'border-accent-on-rounded' (top/bottom accent on rounded card)
checkElementColors(el, style, tag, window): resolveBackground(); checkColors() for pure-black, gray-on-color, low-contrast, AI-palette
checkElementMotion(tag, style): detect bounce/elastic easing (animation-timing-function), layout property animation
checkElementGlow(tag, style, effectiveBg): detect dark-mode colored box-shadow glows
checkElementIconTile(el, tag, window): detect icon tile stacked above heading (AI card template)
checkPageTypography(doc, win): overused-font, single-font, flat-type-hierarchy, gradient-text, all-caps-body, wide-tracking
checkPageLayout(doc, win): nested-cards, monotonous-spacing, everything-centered, line-length, cramped-padding
detectFrameworkConfig(dir): scan for next.config.*, vite.config.*, nuxt.config.*, etc. → return {name, port, configPath}
buildImportGraph(files): parse import statements, resolveImport() to absolute paths, build Map<file, Set<imported>>
isPortListening(port, fingerprint): TCP probe + optional HTTP fingerprint match

mockStyle_pattern.definition: function mockStyle(overrides) { return { borderTopWidth:'0', borderRightWidth:'0', borderBottomWidth:'0', borderLeftWidth:'0', borderTopColor:'', borderRightColor:'', borderBottomColor:'', borderLeftColor:'', borderRadius:'0', ...overrides }; }
mockStyle_pattern.purpose: Test helper inside describe('checkElementBorders'). Creates a minimal mock computed-style object. 'overrides' spread at end lets individual tests inject specific border values.

overrides_in_source.type: Map value: { Top?: {width, color}, Right?: {...}, Bottom?: {...}, Left?: {...} }
overrides_in_source.purpose: Compensates for jsdom silently dropping border shorthands containing CSS var() — stores the pre-resolved width+color per element per side as fallback

test_suite_structure: describe('checkElementBorders') — mockStyle + overrides pattern; detects side-tab, border-accent-on-rounded; skips safe tags, neutral colors, uniform borders
describe('isNeutralColor') — rgb, oklch, lch, oklab, lab, hsl, hwb color formats
describe('detectText — Tailwind side-tab') — Tailwind class patterns (border-l-4, rounded-md)
describe('detectText — CSS borders') — CSS shorthand (border-left: 4px solid #...)
describe('detectText — flat type hierarchy') — font-size spread analysis
describe('checkElementGlow') — box-shadow glow on dark backgrounds
describe('walkDir') — file tree traversal, SCANNABLE_EXTENSIONS filter
describe('CLI') — spawnSync end-to-end tests against fixture files
describe('detectFrameworkConfig') — Next.js, Vite, Nuxt config detection
describe('CLI -- dev server suggestion') — framework detection + port probe integration

data_structures.finding: { antipattern: string, filePath: string, snippet: string, line: number }
data_structures.ANTIPATTERNS_entry: { id: string, category: 'slop'|'quality', name: string, description: string, skillSection?: string, skillGuideline?: string }
data_structures.borderOverrideMap: Map<Element, { Top?, Right?, Bottom?, Left?: { width: number, color: string } }>

key_conditions: isFullPage(content): checks for <html>, <head>, <body> tags — gates page-level analyzers
SAFE_TAGS: Set of tags exempt from element-level checks (nav, a, input, code, svg, etc.)
BORDER_SAFE_TAGS: SAFE_TAGS minus <label> (label re-included for checklist card detection)
